# thousandeyes_dashboard (Resource)

This resource allows you to create and manage Dashboards. For more information, see [Dashboards](https://developer.cisco.com/docs/thousandeyes/list-dashboards/).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "thousandeyes_dashboard" "example" {
  description      = "Example Dashboard description"
  title            = "Example Dashboard"
  is_private       = true
  default_timespan {
    duration = 7200
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `title` (String) Title of a dashboard.

### Optional

- `default_timespan` (Block List, Max: 1) Defines the default time range displayed by the dashboard. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_timespan))
- `description` (String) A text description of the dashboard's purpose and functionality. This information assists users in understanding the dashboard but isn't displayed when viewing a dashboard.
- `global_filter_id` (String) Default global dashboard filter ID.
- `is_global_override` (Boolean) When set to true, the defaultTimespan is used and overrides the widget's timespan. If set to false, the widget's timespan is used.
- `is_private` (Boolean) A dashboard can be viewed by other users in the account. If true, only the creator of the dashboard may view it. If false, all users in the same account may view it.

### Read-Only

- `aid` (String) Identifier for the account group associated with a dashboard.
- `dashboard_created_by` (String) Identifier for the user that created a dashboard.
- `dashboard_modified_by` (String) Identifier for the user that last modified a dashboard.
- `dashboard_modified_date` (String) UTC date/time when a dashboard was last modified (ISO date-time format).
- `id` (String) The tag ID.
- `is_migrated_report` (Boolean) True if this dashboard was previously a report.

<a id="nestedblock--default_timespan"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_timespan`

Optional:

- `duration` (Number) Duration of the timespan in seconds. Mutually exclusive with start/end.
- `end` (String) UTC end date of the timespan range (ISO date-time format). Mutually exclusive with duration.
- `start` (String) UTC start date of the timespan range (ISO date-time format). Mutually exclusive with duration.

## Import
In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, use an [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) providing `resource_id`.
```terraform
import {
  to = thousandeyes_dashboard.example
  id = "resource_id"
}
```

Using `terraform import` command.
```shell
#!/bin/bash
# ThousandEyes Connector can be imported using the dashboard ID
terraform import thousandeyes_dashboard.example resource_id
```
